debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
G : Graph α β
h : (x : α) → @Graph.inessential α β G x
⊢ ∃ M, @Graph.IsMatching α β G M ∧ ∀ (H : Graph α β), H.IsCompOf G → ∃! x, x ∈ H.vertexSet ∧ x ∉ V(G, M)

      intro H hH
      classical
      rcases havoid H hH with ⟨x0, hx0H, hx0not⟩
      refine ⟨x0, ⟨hx0H, hx0not⟩, ?_⟩
      intro y hy
      have hyH : y ∈ V(H) := hy.1
      have hy_not : y ∉ V(G, M0) := hy.2
      have hx0V : x0 ∈ V(G) := hH.subset_vertexSet hx0H
      have hyV : y ∈ V(G) := hH.subset_vertexSet hyH
      by_contra hxy
      have hseries : G.matchingMatroid.Series x0 y := by
        have hadj : G.Adj x0 y := by
          have : x0 ≠ y := ne_of_not_eq hxy
          exact (hH.adj_of_mem_of_ne hx0H hyH this)
        exact matchingMatroid.seriesPair_of_adj (G := G) h hadj
      have hncol : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.IsColoop x0 := by
        exact matchingMatroid.noColoop (G := G) h hx0V
      have hncol' : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.IsColoop y := by
        exact matchingMatroid.noColoop (G := G) h hyV
      have : x0 = y := by
        simpa using hseries.eq_of_not_isColoop_left hncol
      exact hxy this
    · refine ⟨∅, ?_, ?_⟩
      · refine ⟨by simpa using (empty_subset _), ?_⟩
        intro e he f hf hne
        cases he
      intro H hH
      classical
      obtain ⟨x0, hx0H⟩ := (hH.nonempty_vertexSet_of_nonempty hGne)
      refine ⟨x0, ⟨hx0H, by simpa⟩, ?_⟩
      intro y hy
      have : y = x0 := by
        by_contra hne
        have hyH : y ∈ V(H) := hy.1
        have hadj : G.Adj x0 y := hH.adj_of_mem_of_ne hx0H hyH hne
        have hseries : G.matchingMatroid.Series x0 y := matchingMatroid.seriesPair_of_adj (G := G) h hadj
        have hncol : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.IsColoop x0 :=
          matchingMatroid.noColoop (G := G) h (hH.subset_vertexSet hx0H)
        have : x0 = y := by
          simpa using hseries.eq_of_not_isColoop_left hncol
        exact hne this
      simpa [this]

classical
  refine ⟨∅, ?_, ?_⟩
  · refine ⟨by simp, ?_⟩
    intro e he f hf hne
    simp at he
  · intro H hH
    have : (∃! x, x ∈ V(H) ∧ x ∉ V(G, (∅ : Set β))) ↔ (∃! x, x ∈ V(H)) := by
      simp
    rw [this]
    simpa using hH.exists_unique_vertex

classical
  by_contra hcontra
  have h' : ∀ x : α, x ∈ V(G) → ∀ M, G.IsMaxMatching M → x ∈ V(G, M) := by
    intro x hxG M hmax
    by_contra hxM
    have hxiness : G.inessential x := h x
    rcases hxiness with ⟨M', hmax', hxM'⟩
    have : M'.encard = M.encard := by
      simpa [IsMaxMatching.encard hmax', IsMaxMatching.encard hmax]
    exact hxM (by
      have hle : M.encard ≤ M'.encard := hmax.max M' hmax'.toIsMatching
      have hge : M'.encard ≤ M.encard := hmax'.max M hmax.toIsMatching
      exact by
        have := le_antisymm hge hle
        -- use maximality equality, then vertex sets must coincide for matchings? not needed; contradiction from hxM' via choosing M'=M
        simpa using hxM')
  have hess : ∀ x : α, G.inessential x → x ∉ V(G) := by
    intro x hx
    by_contra hxG
    rcases hx with ⟨M, hmax, hxM⟩
    exact hxM (h' x hxG M hmax)
  have : ∀ x : α, x ∈ V(G) → False := by
    intro x hxG
    exact hess x (h x) hxG
  have hV : (V(G) : Set α) = ∅ := by
    ext x; constructor
    · intro hxG; exact (this x hxG).elim
    · intro hx; simpa using hx
  refine hcontra ?_
  refine ⟨∅, ?_, ?_⟩
  · refine ⟨by simp, ?_⟩
    intro e he f hf hne
    simp at he
  · intro H hH
    have : V(H) = ∅ := by
      have hsub : V(H) ⊆ V(G) := hH.vertexSet_subset
      simpa [hV] using (subset_empty_iff.mp (hsub.trans (by simpa [hV])))
    simp [this]

classical
  refine ⟨∅, ?_, ?_⟩
  · refine ⟨by simpa, ?_⟩
    intro e f he hf hne
    simpa using (disjoint_empty_left : Disjoint (V(G, e)) (V(G, f)))
  · intro H hH
    have : ∀ x : α, x ∉ V(G, (∅ : Set β)) := by
      intro x
      simpa [V]
    have hV : V(H).Nonempty := by
      rcases hH.nonempty_vertexSet with ⟨x, hx⟩
      exact ⟨x, hx⟩
    rcases hV with ⟨x, hxH⟩
    refine ⟨x, ⟨hxH, this x⟩, ?_⟩
    intro y hy
    exact Subsingleton.elim y x

classical
  refine ⟨∅, ?_, ?_⟩
  · refine ⟨by simp, ?_⟩
    intro e he f hf hne
    simp at he
  · intro H hH
    have : V(H).Nonempty := by
      simpa [Graph.IsCompOf, Set.Nonempty] using hH.nonempty
    rcases this with ⟨x, hx⟩
    refine ⟨x, ⟨hx, ?_⟩, ?_⟩
    · simp
    · intro y hy
      have : y = x := by
        have hx' : x ∈ V(G) := hH.subset_vertexSet hx
        have hy' : y ∈ V(G) := hH.subset_vertexSet hy.1
        exact hH.eq_of_mem_of_mem hx hy.1
      subst this
      rfl

classical
  refine ⟨∅, ?_, ?_⟩
  · refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
    · simpa using (empty_subset (E(G)))
    · intro e f he hf hne
      exfalso
      exact hne (by simpa using he)
  · intro H hH
    by_cases hV : (V(H)).Nonempty
    · rcases hV with ⟨x, hxH⟩
      refine ⟨x, ⟨hxH, ?_⟩, ?_⟩
      · simpa using (by
          intro hx
          exact hx.elim)
      · intro y hy
        exact (by
          have : y = x := by
            classical
            simpa using (Subsingleton.elim y x)
          simpa [this] )
    · have hV' : V(H) = ∅ := by
        classical
        simpa [Set.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty] using hV
      subst hV'
      refine ⟨x, ?_, ?_⟩
      · refine ⟨by simpa, ?_⟩
        simpa using (by
          intro hx
          exact hx.elim)
      · intro y hy
        exfalso
        simpa using hy.1

classical
  refine ⟨∅, ?_, ?_⟩
  · refine ⟨by simpa using (empty_subset (E(G))), ?_⟩
    intro e f he hf hne
    simp at he
  · intro H hH
    have hV : V(H) = V(G) := by simpa using hH.vertexSet_eq
    obtain ⟨x, hxH⟩ := by
      by_contra hne
      have : V(H) = ∅ := by
        ext v; simp [Set.eq_empty_iff_forall_not_mem, hne]
      have : V(G) = ∅ := by simpa [hV] using this
      exact hH.nonempty (by simpa [Graph.Nonempty, this])
    refine ⟨x, ?_, ?_⟩
    · refine ⟨hxH, ?_⟩
      simp
    · intro y hy
      have : y = x := by
        have hyH : y ∈ V(H) := hy.1
        have hxH' : x ∈ V(H) := hxH
        exact hH.eq_of_mem_vertexSet hyH hxH'
      simpa [this]

classical
  refine ⟨∅, ?_, ?_⟩
  · refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
    · simpa using (empty_subset (E(G)))
    · intro e f he hf hne
      simp at he
  · intro H hH
    have : False := by
      have : (V(H) : Set α) ⊆ V(G) := by
        intro x hx
        exact hH.subset_vertexSet hx
      have hne : (V(H) : Set α).Nonempty := by
        classical
        by_contra hne
        have : (V(H) : Set α) = ∅ := by
          simpa [Set.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty] using hne
        have : H = ⊥ := by
          ext x
          simp [Graph.vertexSet, this]
        exact hH.ne_bot this
      exact False.elim (by
        rcases hne with ⟨x, hx⟩
        have : x ∈ V(G) := this hx
        exact False.elim (by
          rcases h x with ⟨M, hM, hxM⟩
          exact (hxM (by
            have : x ∉ V(G, (∅ : Set β)) := by simp
            exact this)))
    exact this.elim

classical
  refine ⟨∅, ?_, ?_⟩
  ·
    refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
    · simpa [IsMatching, isMatching_iff] using (by
        refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
        · intro e he
          simpa using he
        · intro e f he hf hne
          exfalso
          exact he.elim)
    · intro e f he hf hne
      exfalso
      exact he.elim
  intro H hH
  have : False := by
    classical
    have hx : (Classical.choice (by
        classical
        by_cases hn : (V(H) : Set α).Nonempty
        · exact hn
        ·
          exfalso
          exact hn (by
            rcases hH.nonempty_vertexSet with ⟨x, hx⟩
            exact ⟨x, hx⟩))).1 ∈ V(H) := (Classical.choice (by
        classical
        by_cases hn : (V(H) : Set α).Nonempty
        · exact hn
        ·
          exfalso
          exact hn (by
            rcases hH.nonempty_vertexSet with ⟨x, hx⟩
            exact ⟨x, hx⟩))).2
    exact False.elim (by
      rcases hH.nonempty_vertexSet with ⟨x, hx⟩
      exact (by
        have : (V(H) : Set α).Nonempty := ⟨x, hx⟩
        exact (by
          rcases this with ⟨y, hy⟩
          exact False.elim (by
            simpa using hy))))
  exact this.elim

classical
  by_contra hcon
  push_neg at hcon
  obtain ⟨M, hMmax, hnone⟩ := h (Classical.choice (by
    by_contra hV
    exact hcon ∅ (by simpa using (Graph.empty_isCompOf_iff.2 (by
      simpa using hV))) (by
        simpa using (Graph.empty_isCompOf_iff.2 (by
          simpa using hV)))))) 
  refine hcon M hMmax.toIsMatching ?_
  intro H hH
  have hfin : V(H).Finite := by
    classical
    by_cases hGfin : (V(G)).Finite
    · exact (hH.vertexSet_subset_ground.trans (by rfl)).finite_subset hGfin
    · classical exact (Set.finite_empty).subset (by intro x hx; exact False.elim (hGfin (by
        refine ⟨{x}, ?_⟩
        simpa [Set.Finite] )))
  have hcard : V(H).Nonempty := by
    classical
    by_contra hne
    have : V(H) = ∅ := by
      simpa [Set.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty] using hne
    have : H = ⊥ := by
      ext a <;> simp [this]
    exact hH.ne_bot (by simpa [this])
  classical
  obtain ⟨x, hxV⟩ := hcard
  by_cases hxM : x ∉ V(G, M)
  · refine ⟨x, ⟨hxV, hxM⟩, ?_⟩
    intro y hy
    have : y = x := by
      classical
      by_contra hne
      have hyV : y ∈ V(H) := hy.1
      have : x ∉ V(G, M) ∧ y ∉ V(G, M) := ⟨hxM, hy.2⟩
      exact hnone H hH x (by simpa using hxV) y (by simpa using hyV) hne this
    simpa [this]
  · refine ⟨x, ⟨hxV, hxM⟩, ?_⟩
    intro y hy
    have : y = x := by
      classical
      by_contra hne
      have hyV : y ∈ V(H) := hy.1
      have : x ∉ V(G, M) ∧ y ∉ V(G, M) := ⟨hxM, hy.2⟩
      exact hnone H hH x (by simpa using hxV) y (by simpa using hyV) hne this
    simpa [this]

classical
  refine ⟨∅, ?_, ?_⟩
  · refine ⟨by simp, ?_⟩
    intro e he f hf hne
    simp at he
  · intro H hH
    have : V(H).Subsingleton := by
      classical
      simpa [Graph.IsCompOf.vertexSet_eq] using hH.vertexSet_subsingleton
    rcases hH.exists_mem_vertexSet with ⟨x, hx⟩
    refine ⟨x, ⟨hx, by simp⟩, ?_⟩
    intro y hy
    have : y = x := this hy.1 hx
    simpa [this]

classical
  refine ⟨∅, ?_, ?_⟩
  · refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
    · simpa using (Set.empty_subset (E(G)))
    · intro e f he hf hne
      cases he
  · intro H hH
    obtain ⟨x, hxV⟩ := hH.nonempty_vertexSet
    refine ⟨x, ?_, ?_⟩
    · refine ⟨hxV, ?_⟩
      simpa [V, Graph.V] using hxV
    · intro y hy
      have : y = x := by
        have hyV : y ∈ V(H) := hy.1
        exact hH.eq_of_mem_vertexSet hyV hxV
      simpa [this]
